context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: We route logs to a Coralogix subsystem using the coralogix exporter with subsystem_name_attributes: ["subsystem"]. Our a

checklist.name: no-tell-the-customer-to-rename-the-field-in-t
checklist.description: Identifies the root cause: the coralogix exporter reads application_name_attributes / subsystem_name_attributes from the RESOURCE attributes, but the customer's field lives on the log-record attributes. Proposes an OTTL transform that copies the value into resource.attributes (e.g. set(resource.attributes["subsystem"], attributes["log.file.subsystem"])) inside context: log. Does NOT tell the customer to rename the field in their application or to change the exporter configuration.
